hero.headline: Israel's Leading Padel Platform
hero.subheadline: Find courts, organize tournaments, and manage your club in one comprehensive app.

features.title: Everything in One Place
features.booking_desc: View real-time availability and book courts with a click, including Google Maps navigation.
features.tournaments_desc: Register for local tournaments, track competition stages, and play to win.
features.ranking_desc: Improve your rating with Rally's unique dynamic system.
features.payments_desc: Pay directly in the app securely and quickly with full Israeli market compliance.

crm_features.title: Smart Club Management System
crm_features.dashboard_desc: Control all your courts from one place with a convenient and intuitive interface.
crm_features.revenue_desc: Track revenue and activity data to maximize profits at your club.
crm_features.users_desc: Manage customer records, game history, and subscriptions easily.
crm_features.automated_desc: Save time with a smart billing system, green invoices and receipts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro1: This privacy policy constitutes an integral part of the Terms of Service for the Rally Padel platform and should be read together with the Terms of Service, and using the definitions appearing in the Terms of Service.
privacy.intro2: The operator, Rally Padel 770 Ltd., Co. No. 517325106 (hereinafter: the "Operator" and/or "Rally Padel"), is committed to respecting the privacy of users of the website and application. In order to improve the protection of user privacy, the Operator publishes this privacy policy and provides information about the options available to the user when using the platform and regarding the Operator's conduct regarding information collection in the context of using the service.
privacy.general_p1: As part of using the website and/or application services, the user will be asked to transfer personal details to the Operator, including, inter alia, full name, phone number, email address, location (optional), favorite courts (optional), and additional profile details, which are intended for registration for the service, creating a user account, providing access to the personal area, court reservation and booking, tournament registration, game coordination, finding players, calculating player rating, and providing access to the personal area. This information will be saved and processed for operational, internal, and service purposes, including for providing the service, contacting the user, support, improving the service, calculating player ratings, and future communication with the user. This information is collected through the website and/or application and may also be saved and processed in certain external systems. Payment method details, if requested in the context of court reservation, tournament registration, and/or purchasing products, are required solely for completing the payment and are not saved by the Operator in full, but as an encrypted Token with the payment processor, unless otherwise specified.
privacy.general_p2: When using the website and/or application, data about the user's usage patterns may accumulate. The collected information may include, inter alia, activity and usage patterns, court reservation history, tournament registrations, game results, player rating, time and duration of usage, pages and screens viewed by the user, actions performed, IP address, device identifier, operating system type, browser type, technical usage data, location data (where consent was given), usage preferences, and usage habits. This information is used, inter alia, for operational, statistical, research, marketing, and advertising purposes, for improving the service, calculating player ratings, player matching and recommendations for courts, and is largely non-personally identifying.
privacy.general_p3: The website and application operate, inter alia, through artificial intelligence (AI) technologies and language models (LLM). In the context of the user's interaction with the service, and for the purpose of calculating player rating using an algorithm based on wins, win streaks, who the player beat, and additional parameters, providing court recommendations, player matching, generating insights, statistical analysis, and improving user experience, the system collects, stores, and records information that the user voluntarily provides during the use of the service.
privacy.general_p4: This information may include, inter alia, details about the user, game history and results, wins and losses, information entered in the profile creation context, favorite courts, location (where the user gave permission), player rating, players against whom the user played, tournaments participated in, usage preferences, correspondence in chats and communities, correspondence with the Operator, correspondence with court owners and other users, and any other personal details the user chooses to enter or upload to the system at their own initiative.
privacy.general_p5: Additionally, when using the website and/or application, additional technical and operational information may accumulate, including usage patterns, access times, actions performed, products and/or content the user was interested in, IP address, device type, device identifiers, browser type, and additional system data. This information is used for the Operator's operational purposes, including for routine operation of the service, security, preventing glitches, improving user experience, and improving the performance of the website and/or application, and is largely non-personally identifying.
privacy.general_p6: The system is intended for the purpose of court reservation and booking, tournament registration, game coordination, finding players, personal rating calculation, receiving statistical analysis and general recommendations, as well as for using the auxiliary services provided by the Operator through the website and/or application, including chats and communities. It is clarified that the ratings, analysis, insights, and recommendations displayed in the service are based, inter alia, on technological means and artificial intelligence mechanisms, and are provided for information, personal tracking, and illustration purposes only and do not constitute a professional or official sports evaluation. Do not upload discreet, intimate, medical, biometric, financial, or any other sensitive or confidential information to the service, unless expressly required for operating the service. The system is not intended for storing secrets or sensitive information, and the user should exercise judgment when uploading content to the service. It is clarified that any information, content, and game history and any other information or details uploaded to the system by the user, including game results, ratings, correspondence in chats and communities, may be documented, saved, and processed by the Operator and/or by its service providers, including technology and artificial intelligence providers, for the purpose of providing the service, calculating player ratings, player matching, monitoring, maintenance, security, and improving the service. The user confirms that they are aware that the content they upload to the system may be accessible to the Operator and the aforementioned providers for these purposes.
privacy.database_intro: The data collected about the user mentioned above is saved in the Operator's database. The Operator commits to using the aforementioned information according to this privacy policy and/or according to legal requirements and for the following purposes:
privacy.database_li1: Providing the Service: Creating and managing the user account, court reservation and booking, tournament registration, game coordination, finding players at a similar level, calculating player rating using an AI-based algorithm, displaying game history and results, providing personalized court and player recommendations, displaying personal information to the user, providing access to chats and communities, and providing support services;
privacy.database_li2: Improving the Service and Models: Using information, content, game history, results, usage data, and interaction data for operating the service, improving user experience, improving the accuracy, quality, and performance of the Operator's and/or its service providers' algorithms (including player rating algorithms), models, and systems, all subject to applicable law;
privacy.database_li3: Documentation, Monitoring, and Security: Saving usage history, data, content, game results, ratings, and history uploaded to the system, for documentation, security, fraud prevention, preventing manipulation of the rating system, monitoring, control, troubleshooting, and improving the service and user experience;
privacy.database_li4: Statistics and Analysis: Processing, analyzing, and providing statistical, aggregate, or anonymous information that does not personally identify the user to third parties, including for business, research, operational, and marketing purposes;
privacy.database_li5: Enforcing the Operator's Terms of Service, preventing prohibited use of the service, and protecting the Operator's legal and contractual rights;
privacy.database_li6: For any other purpose specified in the Terms of Service, in this privacy policy, and/or as required by law.
privacy.marketing_intro: User details provided by the user will be subject to the Operator's privacy policy, and the user confirms that the information provided by them and/or collected about them will be saved in the Operator's database for the following purposes:
privacy.marketing_li1: Marketing, advertising, sales promotion, and contacting the user through any means permitted by law, including through direct marketing and various communication channels, in connection with the Operator's services, padel courts, tournaments, updates, benefits, promotions, innovations, professional content in the padel field, and other content that may interest the user;
privacy.marketing_li2: Encouraging loyalty, statistical analysis and research, conducting surveys, examining user preferences, adapting services, products, and content to users, and any other use in connection with registering for the service and using it;
privacy.marketing_li3: Internal, service, and operational purposes, such as handling inquiries, complaint handling, responding to user requests, monitoring, internal enforcement, risk management, and troubleshooting;
privacy.marketing_li4: Operational, marketing, research, and statistical purposes, including processing information, analyzing it, segmenting it, and sending direct marketing subject to user consent and subject to any law;
privacy.marketing_li5: Providing services to the user, managing contact with them, completing actions they requested, and ensuring proper, fair, and legal operation of the service.
privacy.marketing_p1: The user is aware that there is no legal obligation to provide the information, and providing it is done voluntarily and with their consent. However, providing certain information may be required for registration, using certain services, court reservation, tournament registration, game coordination, rating calculation, access to chats and communities, and/or completing purchases. Additionally, the Operator may, for the aforementioned purposes and subject to law, transfer from time to time non-identified, anonymous, or aggregate information about user activity on the website and/or application to partners in the Operator's activities, court owners, service providers, consultants, and any other entity providing the Operator with services related to operating the service.
privacy.marketing_p2: In accordance with the user's consent as required by law, the Operator may contact the user from time to time through direct marketing for receiving offers, tournament updates, event invitations, court promotions, padel content, benefits, and information about the Operator's services, products, and activities, via email, SMS, push notifications, social networks, and/or by phone, as long as the user has not sent a refusal or removal notice, in accordance with legal requirements.
privacy.thirdparty_intro: The following are situations in which the Operator may share user information with third parties:
privacy.thirdparty_li1: To service providers, subcontractors, cloud providers, infrastructure providers, payment processing providers, mailing service providers, support providers, information security providers, data analysis providers, technology and artificial intelligence providers, and padel court owners, as required for operating the service, providing and improving the service, including for transferring order details, order confirmation, payments, and tournament registrations;
privacy.thirdparty_li2: When the user has approved the Operator transferring their personal details to third parties, or has requested the Operator to perform an action involving transferring the aforementioned information;
privacy.thirdparty_li3: In the event that the user violates the website Terms of Service or attempts to perform actions contrary to law;
privacy.thirdparty_li4: In order to enforce the Terms of Service or other agreements or other policies;
privacy.thirdparty_li5: In response to a summons or investigation request, court order, or request for cooperation from an enforcement authority or other governmental authority;
privacy.thirdparty_li6: In order to establish or exercise the Operator's legal rights;
privacy.thirdparty_li7: In order to defend against legal claims as required by law. In such cases, the Operator may raise or waive an objection or right available to it, at its sole discretion;
privacy.thirdparty_li8: When the Operator believes that disclosure is appropriate in connection with efforts to investigate, prevent, report, or take other action regarding illegal activity, suspected fraud, or other wrongdoing;
privacy.thirdparty_li9: In order to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Operator, its employees, website users, or others;
privacy.thirdparty_li10: In connection with a material corporate transaction, such as the sale of the Operator's business, divisional investments, merger, consolidation, or sale of assets, or in the event of dissolution.
privacy.aggregated_p1: The Operator may use aggregated and non-personal information it has collected in any of the circumstances mentioned above. The Operator may combine non-personal information it has collected with additional non-personal information collected from other sources. Additionally, the Operator may share aggregated information with third parties including consultants, advertisers, and investors, for the purpose of conducting general business analysis. For example, the Operator may report to its advertisers about the number of website users, the most viewed products, and more. Such information does not include any personal information and may be used to develop content and service that will help the user and to customize content and advertising.
privacy.ai_title: Third Parties and Use of Artificial Intelligence
privacy.ai_p1: In the context of using the website and for the purpose of creating simulations through the system at the user's request, there are several places on the website where the user can click on links to access sites that are not subject to this privacy policy and are not affiliated with the Operator. Such links may request and/or collect information about the user independently, including personal information from the user, and in some cases provide the Operator with information about the user's activity on such links.
privacy.ai_p2: Any third party to whom the Operator may disclose personal information subject to this privacy policy may have its own privacy policy describing how it uses and discloses the user's personal information. The aforementioned policy will regulate the use, handling, and disclosure of the user's personal information after the Operator has shared it with third parties as described in this privacy policy. If you wish to receive additional information about the privacy policy of those third parties, the Operator encourages you to visit the third party links as mentioned.
privacy.ai_p3: The Operator may permit third parties, including its authorized service providers, suppliers, advertising companies, and advertising networks, to display advertisements on the website and/or application. These entities may use tracking technologies such as Cookies, SDKs, pixels, unique identifiers, and similar means, in order to collect information about users who view or interact with the content, service, or advertisements. The use these third parties make of these technologies is subject to their privacy policies and not the Operator's privacy policy.
privacy.ai_p4: The service is based, inter alia, on artificial intelligence technologies and may use application programming interfaces (APIs), cloud services, data processing tools, analysis engines, rating calculation models, and/or services of local and international third-party providers, including AI providers (hereinafter: "Service Providers").
privacy.ai_p5: When using the service, the information the user enters, game history, results, ratings, location (where consent was given), correspondence, and information required for calculating player rating, providing recommendations, player matching, operating the service, and/or any other need related to providing the service, may be automatically transferred to the servers and/or systems of Service Providers for processing, storage, analysis, generating products, and maintaining the service. Using the service constitutes consent to such transfer and processing, subject to applicable law.
privacy.ai_p6: The user confirms that they are aware that some Service Providers, including AI providers, may use the information, content, game history, results, and data transferred to them for providing the service, quality control, security, maintenance, improving their services, and/or training and improving their models and systems (including player rating models), subject to their policies and applicable legal requirements. Additionally, the Operator may use the aforementioned information for improving, training, and refining its service, systems, algorithms, and models, all subject to applicable law. Therefore, it is recommended not to upload sensitive, confidential, intimate information, or information that the user does not want processed in the context of the service. The Operator uses, as much as possible, services, interfaces, and providers operating at accepted information security standards. However, since some information is processed and/or stored on systems and servers not under the Operator's control, including outside Israel, absolute immunity from exposure, unauthorized access, or security risks at those providers cannot be guaranteed. The Operator may collect location data from the user's mobile device, where the user has given express consent. Location data is used for finding padel courts near the user's location, court recommendations, improving user experience, and displaying relevant content. The user may revoke location permission at any time through device or application settings. In the event that the user participates in chats and communities on the platform, conversation content, messages, and correspondence may be saved in the Operator's systems for documentation, monitoring, security, and enforcing Terms of Service purposes. The Operator takes reasonable security measures to protect conversation privacy, including communication encryption (Encryption), but cannot guarantee absolute protection. It is clarified that chats may be encrypted at the transport layer (Transport Layer Encryption) but are not necessarily encrypted end-to-end (End-to-End Encryption), unless otherwise stated. It is recommended not to share sensitive personal information in chats or communities.
privacy.choices_title: User Choices Regarding Information Collection and Use
privacy.choices_p1: The user may choose not to provide certain information to the Operator, but this will result in not being able to use certain features on the website because such information is required in order to use the Operator's services, including court reservation, tournament registration, rating calculation, game coordination, and access to chats and communities.
privacy.choices_p2: When the user registers for the service and confirms receipt of direct marketing, the Operator may, subject to any law, send direct mailings, emails, SMS messages, system messages, service messages, updates on tournaments, invitations to padel events, alerts, surveys, marketing content, service updates, information about courts, products, benefits, and special offers. If the Operator has already disclosed information about the user to a third party as required by law before the user changed their preferences or updated their information, they may need to update their preferences directly with that third party, as applicable.
privacy.chats_p1: The platform may offer direct chat services between users, groups, and/or communities for padel players. The Operator does not actively monitor chat and community content, and does not check, filter, or verify content uploaded by users. The responsibility for chat content rests solely with the users.
privacy.chats_p2: The Operator takes reasonable security measures to protect conversation privacy, including communication encryption between users. However, the Operator cannot guarantee absolute protection against unauthorized access or data leakage. It is clarified that chats may be encrypted at the transport layer (Transport Layer Encryption) but are not necessarily encrypted end-to-end (End-to-End Encryption), unless otherwise stated.
privacy.chats_p3: The Operator may remove offensive, inciting, defamatory, or content that violates any law, at its sole discretion and without prior notice. The Operator may block a user from accessing chats and communities without prior notice.
privacy.chats_p4: The Operator is not responsible for any damage arising from content published by users in chats and communities, including defamation, fraud, misrepresentation, emotional distress, or any other damage. It is recommended not to share sensitive personal information (such as ID number, credit card details, full home address, etc.) in chats or communities.
privacy.courts_p1: The Operator may transfer to padel court owners information necessary for providing the service, including user details who reserved the court (name, phone, email), reservation details, dates, payment details, and previous reservation history, as required for confirming the reservation, operating the court, and providing the service to the user.
privacy.courts_p2: Court owners commit to keeping the information provided to them confidential and using it solely for the purpose of providing the service to the user. The Operator is not responsible for the use court owners make of the information provided to them, and the user agrees that disclosing information to court owners is necessary for providing the service.
privacy.tech_p1: The Operator may use various technologies to collect information from the user's mobile device and/or computer and about their activity on the website and/or application, including Cookies, SDKs, web beacons, pixels, log files, device identifiers, and similar technological means.
privacy.tech_p2: The Operator may automatically collect information from the user's mobile device, operating system, application, or browser when visiting the website and/or using the application. Such information may include, inter alia, IP address, device type, browser type, browser language, access times, device identifiers, system data, communication provider, usage data, crash data, location data (where consent was given), content of undeleted Cookies, and the referring website address.
privacy.security_p1: The Operator implements in the website and/or application common and up-to-date information security systems and procedures, designed to reduce the risks of unauthorized access, unauthorized use, information loss, or user privacy violation. However, these systems and procedures do not provide absolute security, and the Operator does not commit that its services, systems, or databases will be completely immune to unauthorized access, leakage, loss, or corruption of information.
privacy.security_p2: The Operator periodically reviews the website's and/or application's information security measures and makes changes, adjustments, and upgrades as needed, in order to maintain a reasonable and appropriate level of information security. However, the Operator shall not be responsible for any direct or indirect damage caused to the user in the event of information exposure, loss, or unauthorized use, due to unauthorized access by third parties, cyber events, malfunctions beyond the Operator's control, or as a result of any act or omission beyond its reasonable control.
privacy.access_title: Right to Access and Update Information
privacy.access_p1: According to the Privacy Protection Law, 5741-1981, every person has the right to access information held about them in the Operator's database. A user who has accessed information about themselves and found that the information is incorrect, incomplete, unclear, or not updated, may request the database owner to correct and/or update and/or delete the information held about them as above.
privacy.access_p2: Such a request may be directed to the Operator at the following email address: support@rallypadel.com. It is hereby clarified that there may be changes to the aforementioned contact details and the Operator's availability times at its discretion, and without prior notice, and the user shall have no claims against the Operator for doing so.
privacy.access_p3: If the information in the Operator's database is used for the purpose of personal contact with the user, they may, subject to legal requirements, request in writing that information relating to them be deleted from the database and/or that its use for direct marketing purposes be stopped.
privacy.changes_p1: The Operator may change these privacy policy provisions from time to time, inter alia, to reflect changes in the service, the Operator's activities, legal requirements, or the manner of information processing. If material changes are made to provisions regarding the use of personal information provided by the user, notice will be posted on the website and/or application, at the Operator's discretion and subject to law.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: Welcome to Rally. By using the app or website, you agree to the following terms. Use of the services is subject to the laws of Israel. Any cancellation of a reservation will be made according to the Consumer Protection Law. The responsibility for players' health during tournaments is borne by the players themselves.

level_page.title: How Your Level Works
level_page.intro1: Your level at Rally is a number between 1.0 and 7.0. It is determined after a short skill assessment when you join, and becomes more accurate every time you play a game. The better we know your game, the better Rally works for you.
level_page.tier_d2_desc: Just starting to lift a racket — first steps on the court
level_page.tier_d1_desc: Learning the basics, still building foundations
level_page.tier_c2_desc: Comfortable — consistent rallies, starting to feel the game
level_page.tier_c1_desc: Stable recreational player — knows positions, reads the game
level_page.tier_b2_desc: Competitive club player — tactical awareness, reliable under pressure
level_page.tier_b1_desc: High-level club player / low-level competitive — strong and varied play, tournament experience
level_page.tier_a2_desc: Competitive tournament player — technical and tactical
level_page.tier_a1_desc: Elite level — national or professional tour
level_page.tiers_summary: Levels are divided into three categories: Bronze (1.0–2.9), Silver (3.0–3.9), and Gold (4.0+). Most recreational club players fall in the silver range.
level_page.initial_title: How Your Initial Level Is Determined
level_page.initial_intro: When you first join Rally, you complete a short skill assessment — 13 questions that take about 2 minutes. There are no right or wrong answers; the more honestly you answer, the more accurately your level will reflect your actual game.
level_page.area1_desc: Your general sports background — how long you've played racket sports, how active you currently are, your physical fitness, and your natural athletic talent. This area has more weight for new padel players because the athletic foundation gives the clearest signal.
level_page.area2_desc: How much padel you've actually played — frequency, total volume, comfort on the glass, and your honest self-assessment of your level. Players who have been playing for years will score differently here than beginners.
level_page.area3_desc: Whether you understand court positioning, how you'll handle key game situations, and your tournament history — how many competitions you've participated in and how far you got. This middle pillar is the most important for experienced players.
level_page.weighting_p1: The algorithm adjusts to your profile. If you've never played padel before, your athletic background gets more weight — simply because there's more information there. If you've never participated in a tournament, that weight is redistributed among the other areas. The system always works with what it knows.
level_page.weighting_p2: Rally also runs consistency checks across your answers. If you rate yourself high but show limited tactical knowledge, your self-assessment is automatically moderated. This makes the initial level more reliable for everyone.
level_page.evolves_title: How Your Level Evolves with Games
level_page.evolves_p1: Your level from the questionnaire is your starting point — but it's not fixed. Every game completed in Rally feeds into your game rating, which updates after each game.
level_page.evolves_p2: After each game, the system compares the outcome to what was statistically expected, based on the ratings of both teams. A win against a stronger team raises your level more than a win against a weaker team. A loss to a stronger team barely affects you — this outcome was expected.
level_page.evolves_p3: In doubles, the system takes your partner into account. If you teamed up with a significantly stronger player, your personal contribution is weighted accordingly — so your rating reflects your own performance, not just whether your team won.
level_page.evolves_p4: As you play more games, your game history gradually takes over from your initial assessment:
level_page.evolves_summary: After about 10-15 games, your level is driven almost entirely by your actual results. The questionnaire is a starting point — your game keeps you true to reality.
level_page.accuracy_p1: Your level is the main signal Rally uses to recommend suitable partners and opponents.
level_page.accuracy_p2: When your level is accurate, Rally can show you players who truly match you — close enough that games are competitive, far enough that you're always learning. For club owners, accurate levels mean better organized open play, fairer draws, and players who come back because they had a great game on the court.
level_page.accuracy_p3: The more you play, the better your level will reflect your actual game — and the better Rally will be at connecting you with the right people.
